summary.id: Merancang dan mengawasi pekerjaan mekanikal pada proyek EPC migas dan energi, dari tahap desain hingga commissioning.
summary.en: Design and supervise mechanical scope on oil, gas, and energy EPC projects, from design through commissioning.

description.id:
Kami mencari Mechanical Engineer berpengalaman untuk bergabung dengan tim EPC kami.

  • Min. S1 Teknik Mesin dengan pengalaman 3+ tahun di proyek EPC.
  • Menguasai standar ASME/API dan software perpipaan.
  • Bersedia melakukan kunjungan lapangan ke site proyek.
description.en:
We are looking for an experienced Mechanical Engineer to join our EPC team.

  • Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering with 3+ years on EPC projects.
  • Familiar with ASME/API standards and piping software.
  • Willing to travel to project sites.

summary.id: Mengembangkan penjualan produk instrumentasi dari principal kelas dunia ke pelanggan industri di Indonesia.
summary.en: Grow sales of world-class principal instrumentation products to industrial customers across Indonesia.

description.id:
Tanggung jawab utama:

  • Membangun hubungan dengan pelanggan di sektor migas, petrokimia, dan power plant.
  • Menyusun proposal teknis dan komersial.
  • Min. S1 Teknik (Fisika/Elektro/Instrumentasi), fresh graduate dipersilakan melamar.
description.en:
Key responsibilities:

  • Build relationships with customers in oil & gas, petrochemical, and power sectors.
  • Prepare technical and commercial proposals.
  • Bachelor's in Engineering (Physics/Electrical/Instrumentation); fresh graduates welcome.

summary.id: Mengelola pengadaan material dan jasa untuk mendukung operasional manufaktur dan proyek perusahaan.
summary.en: Manage procurement of materials and services supporting the company's manufacturing and project operations.

description.id:
Kualifikasi:

  • Min. S1 dengan pengalaman 2+ tahun di bidang procurement/purchasing.
  • Memahami proses sourcing, negosiasi, dan vendor management.
  • Teliti, terorganisir, dan mampu bekerja dengan tenggat waktu.
description.en:
Qualifications:

  • Bachelor's degree with 2+ years in procurement/purchasing.
  • Understands sourcing, negotiation, and vendor management.
  • Detail-oriented, organized, and able to work to deadlines.

summary.id: Melakukan instalasi, kalibrasi, dan pemeliharaan instrumentasi di lokasi pelanggan.
summary.en: Perform installation, calibration, and maintenance of instrumentation at customer sites.

description.id:
Persyaratan:

  • Min. D3 Teknik Elektro/Instrumentasi.
  • Pengalaman lapangan di lingkungan industri menjadi nilai tambah.
  • Bersedia ditempatkan dan bertugas di area Kalimantan.
description.en:
Requirements:

  • Diploma in Electrical/Instrumentation Engineering.
  • Field experience in industrial environments is a plus.
  • Willing to be based and assigned in the Kalimantan area.

summary.id: Program magang 6 bulan untuk mahasiswa tingkat akhir yang ingin belajar di lingkungan perusahaan publik.
summary.en: A 6-month internship for final-year students who want hands-on experience in a public company.

description.id:
Apa yang akan kamu pelajari:

  • Mendukung tim finance dalam pencatatan dan rekonsiliasi.
  • Membantu penyusunan laporan rutin.
  • Mahasiswa S1 Akuntansi/Keuangan semester akhir.
description.en:
What you'll learn:

  • Support the finance team with bookkeeping and reconciliation.
  • Help prepare routine reports.
  • Final-semester Accounting/Finance undergraduates.
